layers.name: nn.Conv2d
layers.description: Applies a 2D convolution over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.Conv3d
layers.description: Applies a 3D convolution over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.ConvTranspose1d
layers.description: Applies a 1D transposed convolution operator over an input image composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.ConvTranspose2d
layers.description: Applies a 2D transposed convolution operator over an input image composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.ConvTranspose3d
layers.description: Applies a 3D transposed convolution operator over an input image composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.LazyConv1d
layers.description: A torch.nn.Conv1d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.description: A torch.nn.Conv2d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.description: A torch.nn.Conv3d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.description: A torch.nn.ConvTranspose1d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.description: A torch.nn.ConvTranspose2d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.name: nn.LazyConvTranspose3d
layers.description: A torch.nn.ConvTranspose3d module with lazy initialization of the in_channels argument.

layers.name: nn.Unfold
layers.description: Extracts sliding local blocks from a batched input tensor.

layers.name: nn.Fold
layers.description: Combines an array of sliding local blocks into a large containing tensor.

layers.name: nn.MaxPool2d
layers.description: Applies a 2D max pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.MaxPool3d
layers.description: Applies a 3D max pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.MaxUnpool1d
layers.description: Computes a partial inverse of MaxPool1d.

layers.name: nn.MaxUnpool2d
layers.description: Computes a partial inverse of MaxPool2d.

layers.name: nn.MaxUnpool3d
layers.description: Computes a partial inverse of MaxPool3d.

layers.description: Applies a 1D average pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.description: Applies a 2D average pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.AvgPool3d
layers.description: Applies a 3D average pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.description: Applies a 2D fractional max pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.FractionalMaxPool3d

layers.name: nn.LPPool3d

layers.description: Applies a 2D adaptive average pooling over an input signal composed of several input planes.

layers.name: nn.AdaptiveAvgPool3d

layers.name: nn.ReflectionPad2d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using the reflection of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.ReflectionPad3d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using the reflection of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.ReplicationPad1d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using replication of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.ReplicationPad2d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using replication of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.ReplicationPad3d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using replication of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.ZeroPad1d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with zero.

layers.name: nn.ZeroPad2d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with zero.

layers.name: nn.ZeroPad3d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with zero.

layers.name: nn.ConstantPad1d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with a constant value.

layers.name: nn.ConstantPad2d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with a constant value.

layers.name: nn.ConstantPad3d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor boundaries with a constant value.

layers.name: nn.CircularPad1d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using circular padding of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.CircularPad2d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using circular padding of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.CircularPad3d
layers.description: Pads the input tensor using circular padding of the input boundary.

layers.name: nn.BatchNorm2d
layers.description: Applies Batch Normalization over a 4D input.

layers.name: nn.BatchNorm3d
layers.description: Applies Batch Normalization over a 5D input.

layers.name: nn.LazyBatchNorm1d
layers.description: A torch.nn.BatchNorm1d module with lazy initialization.

layers.name: nn.LazyBatchNorm2d
layers.description: A torch.nn.BatchNorm2d module with lazy initialization.

layers.name: nn.LazyBatchNorm3d
layers.description: A torch.nn.BatchNorm3d module with lazy initialization.

layers.name: nn.GroupNorm
layers.description: Applies Group Normalization over a mini-batch of inputs.

layers.name: nn.SyncBatchNorm
layers.description: Applies Batch Normalization over a N-Dimensional input.

layers.name: nn.InstanceNorm1d
layers.description: Applies Instance Normalization.

layers.name: nn.InstanceNorm2d
layers.description: Applies Instance Normalization.

layers.name: nn.InstanceNorm3d
layers.description: Applies Instance Normalization.

layers.name: nn.LazyInstanceNorm1d
layers.description: A torch.nn.InstanceNorm1d module with lazy initialization of the num_features argument.

layers.name: nn.LazyInstanceNorm2d
layers.description: A torch.nn.InstanceNorm2d module with lazy initialization of the num_features argument.

layers.name: nn.LazyInstanceNorm3d
layers.description: A torch.nn.InstanceNorm3d module with lazy initialization of the num_features argument.

layers.name: nn.LayerNorm
layers.description: Applies Layer Normalization over a mini-batch of inputs.

layers.name: nn.LocalResponseNorm
layers.description: Applies local response normalization over an input signal.

layers.name: nn.RMSNorm
layers.description: Applies Root Mean Square Layer Normalization over a mini-batch of inputs.

layers.name: nn.RNN
layers.description: Apply a multi-layer Elman RNN with tanh⁡\tanhtanh or ReLU\text{ReLU}ReLU non-linearity to an input sequence.

layers.name: nn.LSTM
layers.description: Apply a multi-layer long short-term memory (LSTM) RNN to an input sequence.

layers.name: nn.GRU
layers.description: Apply a multi-layer gated recurrent unit (GRU) RNN to an input sequence.

layers.name: nn.RNNCell
layers.description: An Elman RNN cell with tanh or ReLU non-linearity.

layers.name: nn.LSTMCell
layers.description: A long short-term memory (LSTM) cell.

layers.name: nn.GRUCell
layers.description: A gated recurrent unit (GRU) cell.

layers.name: nn.TransformerEncoder
layers.description: TransformerEncoder is a stack of N encoder layers.

layers.name: nn.TransformerDecoder
layers.description: TransformerDecoder is a stack of N decoder layers.

layers.name: nn.TransformerEncoderLayer
layers.description: TransformerEncoderLayer is made up of self-attn and feedforward network.

layers.name: nn.TransformerDecoderLayer
layers.description: TransformerDecoderLayer is made up of self-attn, multi-head-attn and feedforward network.

layers.name: nn.Linear
layers.description: Applies an affine linear transformation to the incoming data: y=xAT+by = xA^T + by=xAT+b.

layers.name: nn.Bilinear
layers.description: Applies a bilinear transformation to the incoming data: y=x1TAx2+by = x_1^T A x_2 + by=x1T​Ax2​+b.

layers.name: nn.LazyLinear
layers.description: A torch.nn.Linear module where in_features is inferred.

layers.name: nn.Dropout1d
layers.description: Randomly zero out entire channels.

layers.name: nn.Dropout2d
layers.description: Randomly zero out entire channels.

layers.name: nn.Dropout3d
layers.description: Randomly zero out entire channels.

layers.name: nn.AlphaDropout
layers.description: Applies Alpha Dropout over the input.

layers.name: nn.FeatureAlphaDropout
layers.description: Randomly masks out entire channels.

layers.name: nn.EmbeddingBag
layers.description: Compute sums or means of 'bags' of embeddings, without instantiating the intermediate embeddings.

layers.name: nn.PixelUnshuffle
layers.description: Reverse the PixelShuffle operation.

layers.name: nn.Upsample
layers.description: Upsamples a given multi-channel 1D (temporal), 2D (spatial) or 3D (volumetric) data.

layers.name: nn.UpsamplingNearest2d
layers.description: Applies a 2D nearest neighbor upsampling to an input signal composed of several input channels.

layers.name: nn.UpsamplingBilinear2d
layers.description: Applies a 2D bilinear upsampling to an input signal composed of several input channels.

layers.name: nn.parallel.DistributedDataParallel
layers.description: Implement distributed data parallelism based on torch.distributed at module level.

activations.name: nn.Hardshrink
activations.description: Applies the Hard Shrinkage (Hardshrink) function element-wise.

activations.name: nn.MultiheadAttention
activations.description: Allows the model to jointly attend to information from different representation subspaces.

activations.name: nn.ReLU
activations.description: Applies the rectified linear unit function element-wise.

activations.name: nn.RReLU
activations.description: Applies the randomized leaky rectified linear unit function, element-wise.

activations.name: nn.GELU
activations.description: Applies the Gaussian Error Linear Units function.

activations.name: nn.SiLU
activations.description: Applies the Sigmoid Linear Unit (SiLU) function, element-wise.

activations.name: nn.Softshrink
activations.description: Applies the soft shrinkage function element-wise.

activations.name: nn.Tanh
activations.description: Applies the Hyperbolic Tangent (Tanh) function element-wise.

activations.name: nn.Threshold
activations.description: Thresholds each element of the input Tensor.

activations.name: nn.GLU
activations.description: Applies the gated linear unit function.

activations.name: nn.Softmax
activations.description: Applies the Softmax function to an n-dimensional input Tensor.

activations.name: nn.Softmax2d
activations.description: Applies SoftMax over features to each spatial location.

activations.name: nn.LogSoftmax
activations.description: Applies the log⁡(Softmax(x))\log(\text{Softmax}(x))log(Softmax(x)) function to an n-dimensional input Tensor.
